meaning: n.东京(越南北部一地区的旧称)
examples: Lyndon B. Johnson was ratcheting up the Vietnam War, so the Gulf of Tonkin Resolution was passed in 1964, which authorized bombing raids on Cambodia.
This was known as the Gulf of Tonkin Incident.
Guangxi has a short coastline on the Gulf of Tonkin.
The Independent's Boyd Tonkin also noted "a plot rammed to bursting point with guide-book factoids".
Jones had even been an injury doubt before the game, along with defenders Colin Murdock and Anthony Tonkin.
